meaning: n.隸芽ｮｼ(蟆､謖匀撼蛻台ｺ区｡井ｻｶ)
examples: They threatened him with a lawsuit.
Customers were doubly deceived, the lawsuit claims.
He was perpetually involving himself in this long lawsuit.
Merges says the WTO lawsuit shows the United States has run out of patience.
The lawsuit, which seeks unspecified damages, is still pending in state court in Ohio.
